[[Georgia Rucker]] |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |release date=[[September]] [[1997]] {{C|First printing}}''Star Wars Kids'' 4 |subscribers=[[December]] 1997 {{C|Release}}''Star Wars Kids'' 4 was released packaged with ''[[Star Wars Missions 4: Destroy the Liquidator]]'', for which the [[StarWars.com]] Cargo Bay [https://web.archive.org/web/20040803144738/http://cargobay.starwars.com/webapps/cargobay/item-detail/607 listed] a release date of [[December]] [[1997]]. ''Destroy the Liquidator'' additionally denotes a [[December]] 1997 release date. |pages=26 |isbn=0-590-12791-8 |issn= |genre= |issue=4 |series=[[Star Wars Kids (1997)|''Star Wars Kids'' (1997)]] }} {{Quote|On page 8, meet a great Rebel hero — Wedge Antilles!|Luke Skywalker, ''Star Wars Kids'' 4 introduction|[[Star Wars Kids (1997) 4|''Star Wars Kids'' (1997) 4]]}} '''''Star Wars Kids'' 4''' is the fourth issue of [[Star Wars Kids (1997)|''Star Wars Kids'']] magazine. It was published by [[Scholastic]] and released in [[December]] [[1997]]. Issue 4 included part four of the serial [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] ''[[The Rebel Thief]]'', written by [[Ryder Windham]]. ''Star Wars Kids'' 4 was available exclusively to subscribers of Scholastic's ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' young-reader series and [[roleplaying game]], which arrived as monthly continuity packages via direct mail. Each package included a new ''Star Wars Kids'' magazine issue and the latest ''Star Wars Missions'' adventure book. ''Star Wars Kids'' 4 came packaged with the game's fourth adventure book, [[Star Wars Missions 4: Destroy the Liquidator|''Destroy the Liquidator'']]. {{Magazine-stub|issue}} ==Contents== ===Features=== *'''"[[So You Think You Wanna Be a Rebel Pilot?]]"''' *'''"[[Meet...|Meet Wedge!]]"''' by [[Scott Chernoff]] *:''Star Wars Kids'' talks to Rebel Hero Denis Lawson! *'''"Space Science: Asteroids"''' by Terry Ray Hiller *'''"[[Who Is That Alien?]] Tauntauns & Wampas"''' by [[Bill Smith]] *'''"[[Star Wars Kids Feature Planet|On Our Planet: Hoth]]"''' by [[Terry Ray Hiller]] *'''"[[The Rebel Thief|''The Rebel Thief, Part 4'']]"''' by [[Ryder Windham]] ===Departments=== *'''"A-maze-ing Universe"''' *:Use Rebel pilot know-how to navigate through the AT-AT crossfire! *'''"''Star Wars Missions'' Bonus Page"''' *'''"Brain Blasters"''' *:...For the ultimate ''Star Wars'' fan. *'''"Yoda's Puzzle Pages"''' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{KidsNav|3|5}} {{Interlang |fi=Star Wars Kids 4 }} [[Category:Star Wars Kids (1997) issues|04]]
